channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: tech

item.title: Women Congressional Candidates Face Increased Hate Speech on Social Platform X - Study Reveals Alarming Trends
item.description: A new study by the Center for Democracy and Technology and the University of Pittsburgh reveals that women congressional candidates, particularly those of color, are targeted with hate speech at alarming rates on social platform X.
item.dc:creator: Major Digest
